creator: inagaki@tg.rim.or.jp
text:
update!

	new japanese/ptex-common is used kpathsea libraries version 3.2
	xdvik-20a is not required new kpathsea libraries.

	so update port.	xdvik-20c is required new kpathsea.

	attention!!

	old and new kpathsea libraries is not mix up.
	kpathsea is not interchangeable.
